titleStmt.title: SII 19.198: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao, Dines Chandra Sircar and G.S. Gai
No. 198. (A.R. No. 358 of 1906.) KUḌUMIYĀMALAI, PUDUKKOTTAI STATE, TIRUCHIRAPALLI DISTRICT. ON THE NORTH WALL OF THE SECOND prākāra, ŚIKHĀNĀTHASVĀMI TEMPLE.

summary.p: This is stated to be a copy of an older document incised at the instance of the headman of Kīḻ-Taṇiyam in Ollaiyūr-kūṟṟam. It records the deposit of 14 kaḻañju of gold (presented to the temple), with certain specified persons for the supply of ghee for burning a perpetual lamp in the temple of Tirunalakkuṉṟam-uḍaiya-Nāyanār.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . Ollaiyūrkūṟṟattu kiḻtaṇiyattil kiḻavaṉ kalpaṭikka . koparakecaripaṉmarkku yāṇṭu 8vatu tirunalakkuṉṟamuṭaiya [nāyaṉār śrīri] paṇṭārattu poṉ kaḻañcu
nāḻiney koḷap poṉ kaḻañcum meṟpaṭi Uri ney Aḷakka koṇṭa poṉ Arai kaḻañcum meṟpaṭiyūril tiḷaiyaṉa kampal tiṅkaḷ Uri[y� ney A]ḷakka
koṇṭa poṉ Arai kaḻañcum meṟpaṭiyūril civakocari catirpetikaṇṭaṉ tiṅkaḷ nāḻi ney Aḷakka koṇṭa poṉ kaḻañcum meṟpaṭiyūril kāmacaraṅkaṉ Irunāḻi ney Aḷakka koṇṭa poṉ Irukaḻañ
cum meṟpaṭiya kalavaṉ tiṅkaḷ nāḻiney Aḷakka koṇṭa poṉ kaḻañcum meṟpaṭi yaraiyāṉ perumāṉ tiṅkaḷ Uriya ney Aḷakka koṇṭa poṉ Arai kaḻañcum meṟpaṭiyaṉ poṉṉaṉ ve
ḷḷaika tiṅkaḷ Aḷakka koṇṭa poṉ kaḻañcum meṟpaṭiyaṉ tiṅkaḷ Uri ney Aḷakka koṇṭa poṉ Arai kaḻañcum Āka poṉ patiṉālkaḻañcum Itu mākecura rakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 19.198 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
